race.comment: ASHINA (1) is back after a break of four-and-a-half months. She got over more ground last time in but did hit the line strongly for second on debut at Cranbourne over this trip and can be improved this time in. Hard to hold out. CRAFTY QUEEN (2) wound up strongly last time out to finish a long neck adrift in second at this track and distance. Drawn wide here isn't ideal but a repeat of last time goes close. VERY FAMOUS (12) is a five-start maiden who finished fourth, beaten 4 lengths, when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at this track. Quickly up in trip but she showed some ability last time in and can figure. OUTSIDETHESQUARE (7) was fair on debut last start when sixth over 1300m at Bendigo. Can improve quickly off that and must be respected for the Begg yard.
